{{CargoRelic
|name=Summer Album
|class_id=20172
|rank=Green
|affct=ART
|source=
|description=This captivating photo album, made by an unknown photographer, captures the beauty of several bikini-clad women during their vacation on an island. It features the most remarkable moments, carefully selected and compiled in this limited edition.
|fame=15
|art=31
|fth=14
|civ=13
|tech=17
|ss1=Per sign-in, Snail HP +10<br>Sign-Ins: 20/20
|ss2=Per sign-in, Snail HP +20<br>Sign-Ins: 20/20
|ss3=Per sign-in, Snail HP +30<br>Sign-Ins: 20/20
|ss4=Per sign-in, Snail HP +30<br>Sign-Ins: 20/20
|ss7=Per sign-in, Snail HP +30<br>Sign-Ins: 20/20<br> (Awakened)
}}
